steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: Before the blank: "...two other Black Americans who served in Congress" — a complete independent clause. After the blank: a list of two names. Independent clause + list = colon.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
Congress: introduces the list of names. A (period) breaks the sentence into a fragment. C (semicolon) doesn't introduce a list this way. D (no punctuation) runs the names directly into the clause without signaling the list.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
